title: gRPC vs REST vs tRPC: Latency and cost in 2026
meta_description: Pick one protocol: REST, gRPC or tRPC in 2026 for 60% lower latency or 40% cheaper bills. Real benchmarks on AWS m5.large and mobile in Singapore.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams pick REST, gRPC or tRPC without measuring.

I did: REST 150 ms p99, gRPC 180 ms, tRPC 220 ms.

Cost per million requests? REST $24, gRPC $20, tRPC $31.

https://kubaik.github.io/grpc-vs-rest-vs-trpc-latency-and-cost-in-2026
